key_additions: _ClusterExpandSheet widget for cluster expand bottom sheet
Enhanced _onClusterTap to show expand bottom sheet
trip_map_screen.dart.architecture: ConsumerWidget pattern with private widgets for cluster expansion

cluster_tap_handling_test.dart.coverage: Expand sheet display, callbacks, grouping, empty clusters, bounds calculation, performance

CLUSTER_TAP_HANDLING_README.md.sections: Complete feature documentation, architecture explanation, usage examples, UI structure reference, type grouping reference, performance considerations, testing guidelines, best practices, troubleshooting, future enhancements

TRIP_MAP_README.md.update: Added 'Cluster Tap-to-Expand' section with implementation details, UI structure diagram, type grouping reference, performance metrics, testing instructions

patterns_discovered.widget_architecture: ConsumerWidget with private widgets for cluster expansion
patterns_discovered.type_grouping: 8 marker types (Trips, Activities, Photos, Accommodations, Restaurants, Transport, Places, Other)
patterns_discovered.ui_patterns: Bottom sheet with handle bar, type sections with count badges, marker list items with tap handling
patterns_discovered.performance: One-time marker lookup from provider, O(n) grouping and bounds calculation, ClampingScrollPhysics for smooth scrolling
patterns_discovered.user_flow: Cluster tap → bottom sheet → type organization → user interactions (zoom, marker tap, close)

gotchas_discovered.marker_resolution: Need to resolve marker IDs from provider to display actual marker information
gotchas_discovered.bounds_calculation: Must calculate proper bounds for 'Zoom to Fit' functionality
gotchas_discovered.type_grouping: Handle edge cases for empty clusters and multiple markers of same type
gotchas_discovered.performance: Large clusters need scrollable list with proper physics
gotchas_discovered.accessibility: Ensure 48dp tap targets and proper semantic labels

features_implemented: Cluster expand bottom sheet showing all markers in cluster
Markers grouped by type with count badges
Type-specific icons and colors (8 marker types)
Quick action buttons (Zoom to Fit, Close)
Bounds calculation for Zoom to Fit
approach_outcome.user_experience: Tap cluster → bottom sheet appears → markers organized by type → user can zoom, tap markers, or close
approach_outcome.performance_benefits: O(n) grouping and bounds calculation, one-time marker lookup, smooth scrolling with ClampingScrollPhysics

recommendations.architecture: Phase 5 is complete, ready to begin Phase 6: Memory Optimization
